framework.name: High-Trust Community Launch Strategy
framework.description: Launch marketplaces in controlled, high-trust environments first (example: Harvard parking lot for car-sharing). Pre-existing trust between participants reduces friction and encourages early investment of time, resources, and money into the platform.
framework.raw_quote: we launched in a very controlled environment basically on the Harvard parking lot that was really really high trust between the suppliers and the users... if you can find a community where there's High trust already or build it that can be a really effective way
